title_es: Batalla de Avena: Fresca vs. Saborizada
hook_en: Watch me transform oats two ways: healthy and sugary!
hook_es: ¡Mira cómo transformo la avena de dos maneras: saludable y azucarada!
key_message: Instant flavored oatmeal is convenient but packed with added sugars and artificial flavors—opt for fresh, whole ingredients for a healthier start.
visual_elements: Split screen: Steel-cut oats with fresh berries on one side, instant flavored oatmeal packet on the other
Close-up of instant packet ingredients list highlighting sugars and artificial flavors
Dramatic pour of fresh berries over steel-cut oats
_source_food_context: • HEALTHY: Steel-cut oats with fresh berries vs. PROCESSED: Instant flavored oatmeal packets — Instant packets contain up to 12g added sugar and artificial flavors

title_en: Morning Oats: Sweet N' Simple vs. Sneaky Sugars
title_es: Avena Matutina: Dulce y Simple vs. Azúcares Ocultos
hook_en: Can you guess which oatmeal keeps you fuller longer?
hook_es: ¿Puedes adivinar qué avena te mantiene satisfecho por más tiempo?
key_message: Choosing steel-cut oats with fresh berries is a smarter choice for sustained energy and fewer hidden sugars compared to instant packets.
visual_elements: Close-up: Measuring sugar content from instant packet into a bowl
Side-by-side comparison: Finished bowls of steel-cut oats with fresh berries and instant oatmeal with a sugar packet beside it
Visual of a hand holding a clock, emphasizing how long each option keeps you full
_source_food_context: • HEALTHY: Steel-cut oats with fresh berries vs. PROCESSED: Instant flavored oatmeal packets — Instant packets contain up to 12g added sugar and artificial flavors
